rag_rules: Generate guarantees using visible ports or equivalent eq-defined variables, not AADL properties or unresolved identifiers.
Place component-type guarantees in the type-level annex agree block; use implementation annex only for assign statements with valid output bindings.
generic_rules: Use AGREE logical operators (=>, and, or, not) for relational expressions.
Define temporal or conditional logic using initialized recurrence or nested if-then-else in eq declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use int, real, bool as scalar types; never integer or boolean.
Annex must be wrapped as annex agree {** ... **};
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent paths or implementation-level ports in component type contracts.
